message:
feat(core): add auto_tuning bench + Cargo.toml registration (wa-ssm4)

Add criterion benchmark for auto-tuning parameter search latency,
hysteresis evaluation, and clamp_to_ranges. Register bench in Cargo.toml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -167,6 +167,10 @@ required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
 name = "differential_snapshot"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "auto_tuning"
+harness = false
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "outcome_adapter"
 harness = false

@@ -5,3 +5,4 @@
 # It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
 # everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
 cc 3df387d8f89fd38f0094c43e5098e126d4e2c60c5a37ecda1bf0873f97453ee5 # shrinks to rss = 0.0, latency = 9.289741172740648, cpu = 0.44364171271834313
+cc f7ce6b03c54ad86ae601cea6e9b3edaaaf03ebce9d483d60dd7f7aed79c322b4 # shrinks to rss = 0.0, latency = 9.125951908523605, cpu = 0.6603742507193981
